about.title: Airdump
about.subtitle: The easiest way to transfer files across devices.

footer.description: The easiest way to transfer data across devices.
footer.discovery: Allow me to be discovered by: Everyone in this network.

no_peers: Open Airdump on other devices to send files.

instructions.mobile: Tap to send files or long tap to send a message.
